chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2735 of 2025 Shehzada Gulfam Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections No.1 to 6. 2. For hearing of CMA No.12437/25 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.08.2025 Mr. Shafiq Ahmed, advocate for Petitioner. Mr. M. Khurram Ghayyas, advocate for Respondent No.2/KMC. M/s Dhani Bux Lashari, Rafique Ahmed Bhambhro and Ms. Humera Jatoi, advocate for Respondent No.3/SBCA. Mr. Mubarak Ahmed, advocate for Respondent No.5/K.D.A. Inspector M.A. Pirzada for SHO Mominabad/Respondent No.6. -.-.- Petitioner has challenged a notice by K.M.C. for demolition of unauthorized rooms and boundary wall constructed on Plot No.ST-15, Sector 10 Orangi Towhship, Karachi, built allegedly in violation of Supreme Court order in Case No.815-K. The case of the petitioner is that he is owner of said plot by virtue of a registered lease deed dated 30.06.1986 in his favour, which was allotted to him by KDA in the year 1968. Learned counsel for K.M.C. has submitted objections and proposes that the petitioner may file a reply to the show-cause notice issued to him stating the above facts. This issue would be examined and decided through a speaking order and till then no coercive action will be taken against him. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of with the observation that let KMC issue a proper notice to the petitioner, which he may reply within the stipulated time, and then decision should be made through a speaking order by the K.M.C. Till such order is passed, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner.

Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of with the observation that let KMC issue a proper notice to the petitioner, which he may reply within the stipulated time, and then decision should be made through a speaking order by the K.M.C. Till such order is passed, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge
